mapper.select:
select tableid as tableId, tablename as tableName, objectname as tableNameCh from synlte.object o left join synlte.objectfield f on o.objectid = f.objectid
upper(f.fieldid) = upper(#{fieldId}) and upper(o.relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
and (upper(tablename) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) or upper(objectname) like upper(concat('%',concat(#{searchName},'%'))) )
group by tableid, tablename, objectname

select PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as organizationClassify, SJYJFL||','||SJEJFLCODENAME||','||SJEJFL as classIds, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH||'/'||SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as sourceClassify, SJLYYJ||','||SJLYEJ as sourceClassIds, LABELS from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where upper(sjxjbm) = upper(#{tableId}) and SJXJBM is not null

select distinct PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||FIRSTORGANIZATIONCH||'/'||SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as organizationClassify, SJYJFL||','||SJEJFLCODENAME||','||SJEJFL as classIds, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH||'/'||SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as sourceClassify, SJLYYJ||','||SJLYEJ as sourceClassIds, LABELS, SJXJBM as tableId from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where SJXJBM is not null

select label, value from (
select distinct PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as value, PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as value, PRIMARYDATASOURCECH as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYDATASOURCECH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct FACTORONENAME as value, FACTORONENAME as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where FACTORONENAME is not null and SJXJBM is not null
) t1

select value, label from (
select distinct SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as value, SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH = #{firstClassValue} and SECONDARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as value, SECONDARYDATASOURCECH as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where PRIMARYDATASOURCECH = #{firstClassValue} and SECONDARYDATASOURCECH is not null and SJXJBM is not null
select distinct FACTORTWONAME as value, FACTORTWONAME as label from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where FACTORONENAME = #{firstClassValue} and FACTORTWONAME is not null and SJXJBM is not null
) t1

update.if: update synlte.OBJECT set OBJECTNAME = #{dataSourceName}, OBJECTSTATE = #{objectState}, OBJECTMEMO = #{objectMemo}, sourceid = #{sourceId}, TABLENAME = #{realTablename}, STORETYPE = #{storeType}, DATA_SOURCE = #{dataSource}, ISACTIVETABLE = #{isActiveTable}, SJZYBQ1 = #{sjzybq1}, SJZYBQ2 = #{sjzybq2}, SJZYBQ3 = #{sjzybq3}, SJZYBQ4 = #{sjzybq4}, SJZYBQ5 = #{sjzybq5}, SJZYBQ6 = #{sjzybq6}, SJZZYJFLVALLUE = #{sjzzyjflVallue}, SJZZEJFLVALUE = #{sjzzejflValue}, SJZYLYLXVALUE = #{sjzylylxValue}, TANDARD_TYPE = #{standardType} where upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId})

update synlte.OBJECT set OBJECTNAME = #{objectName}, OBJECTSTATE = #{objectState}, OBJECTMEMO = #{objectMemo}, sourceid = #{sourceId}, STORETYPE = #{storeType}, ISACTIVETABLE = #{isActiveTable} where upper(TABLEID) = upper(#{tableId})

mapper.update: update synlte.OBJECT set OBJECTNAME = #{dataSourceName}, OBJECTSTATE = #{objectState}, TABLENAME = #{realTablename}, STORETYPE = #{storeType}, DATA_SOURCE = #{codeTextTd}, sourceid = #{sourceId}, OBJECTMEMO = #{objectMemo}, HIVETABLENAME = #{realTablename}, DATATYPE = #{dataType, jdbcType = INTEGER}, OBJECTFLAG = #{objectFlag, jdbcType = INTEGER}, HD_DBSOURCE = #{hdDbSource}, DBSOURCE = #{dbSource}, ISACTIVETABLE = #{isActiveTable}, UPDATETIME = sysdate, UPDATER = #{updater}, CREATOR = #{creator}, VERSION = #{version}, SECRETLEVEL = #{dataLeve```l}, SJZYBQ1 = #{sjzybq1}, SJZYBQ2 = #{sjzybq2}, SJZYBQ3 = #{sjzybq3}, SJZYBQ4 = #{sjzybq4}, SJZYBQ5 = #{sjzybq5}, SJZYBQ6 = #{sjzybq6}, STANDARD_TYPE = #{standardType, jdbcType = INTEGER}, SJZZYJFLVALLUE = #{sjzzyjflVallue}, SJZZEJFLVALUE = #{sjzzejflValue}, SJZYLYLXVALUE = #{sjzylylxValue} where UPPER(OBJECTID) = UPPER(#{objectId})

update dp_table_organization_assets set PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = #{oneSourceClassifyCh}, SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH = #{twoSourceClassifyCh}, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = #{oneOrganizationClassifyCh}, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = #{twoOrganizationClassifyCh}, THREELEVEL_ORGANIZATION_CH = #{threeOrganizationClassifyCh} where upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = #{tableName}

update DP_TABLE_ORGANIZATION_ASSETS_TEMP set PRIMARY_DATASOURCE_CH = #{oneSourceClassifyCh}, SECONDARY_DATASOURCE_CH = #{twoSourceClassifyCh}, PRIMARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = #{oneOrganizationClassifyCh}, SECONDARY_ORGANIZATION_CH = #{twoOrganizationClassifyCh}, THREE_ORGANIZATION_CH = #{threeOrganizationClassifyCh} where upper(TABLE_NAME_EN) = #{tableName}
mapper.select: select v1.CODETEXT || '/' || v2.CODETEXT as label, v1.codeid || '/' || v2.codeid as value from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.CODEID = v2.PARCODEID where v2.CODENAME = '01001'

select distinct objectid as objectId, objectname as objectName, tablename as tableName, tableid as tableId, sjzzyjflvallue as organizationClassificationId from synlte.object where OBJECTSTATE = 1 and objectname is not null and relate_tablename = 'OBJECTFIELD'

select objectstateStr as value, objectstateStr || '(' || count(0) || ')' as label from (select case when objectstate = 1 then '已发布' when objectstate = 0 then '未发布' else '停用' end as objectstateStr from synlte.object where DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD') group by objectstateStr

select distinct dataName from( select distinct objectname as dataName from synlte.object
DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
and upper(objectname) like upper('%'||#{searchValue}||'%')
union all select distinct tableid as dataName from synlte.object
DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
and upper(tableid) like '%'||upper('%'||#{searchValue}||'%')
union all select distinct tablename as dataName from synlte.object
DELETED = 0 and upper(relate_tablename) = 'OBJECTFIELD'
and upper(tablename) like upper('%'||#{searchValue}||'%')
)

select sjxjbm as sourceId, name as dataSourceName from CLASSIFY_INTERFACE_ALL_DATE where upper(tablename) = upper(#{addTableName}) AND sjxjbm is not null AND PRIMARYORGANIZATIONCH is not null and rownum = 1

select v1.codeid as mainClassifyId, v1.codetext as mainClassifyCh, v2.codeid as primaryClassifyId, v2.codetext as primaryClassifyCh, v3.codeid as secondaryClassifyId, v3.codetext as secondaryClassifyCh, v4.CODEID as threeClassifyId, v4.CODETEXT as threeClassifyCh from (select CODEID, CODENAME, CODETEXT, PARCODEID from v_classify_info
where codetext = '数据组织分类'
where codetext = '数据来源分类'
) v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid = v2.PARCODEID left join v_classify_info v3 on v2.codeid = v3.PARCODEID left join v_classify_info v4 on v3.codeid = v4.PARCODEID order by v3.codeid asc

select.if: select v3.codename from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid=v2.parcodeid left join v_classify_info v3 on v3.parcodeid = v2.codeid where v1.codetext = '数据来源分类' and rownum =1 and upper(v3.codeid) = upper(#{id})
select v2.codename from v_classify_info v1 left join v_classify_info v2 on v1.codeid=v2.parcodeid where v1.codetext = '数据来源分类' and upper(v2.codeid) = upper(#{id})

mapper.update:
update synlte.object set updatetime = sysdate,
SJZYBQ1=#{sjzybq1,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZYBQ2=#{sjzybq2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZYBQ3=#{sjzybq3,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZYBQ4=#{sjzybq4,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZYBQ5=#{sjzybq5,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZYBQ6=#{sjzybq6,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZZYJFLVALLUE =#{sjzzyjfl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZZEJFLVALUE =#{sjzzejfl,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SJZYLYLXVALUE=#{sjzylylx},
updater = #{updater} where upper(TABLEID) in (
select #{item} from dual
)
